title: Live AI Q&A + Crushing it in Chess at the Same Time - Come Hang Out!
summary: Cole Medin announced a live AI Q&A stream on Saturdays at 9 AM CT where viewers can ask questions about AI coding, agents, Claude Code, and Archon. The stream combines technical discussion with casual chess gameplay and community engagement through the Dynamous platform.
writeup: Cole Medin hosts a live Saturday Q&A on AI coding, agents, Claude Code, and Archon, taking viewer questions while playing chess. The session sits alongside the channel's regular Wednesday content drops. The format combines open audience questions with casual chess play rather than a structured lecture.
